Prime Fade

A proper barbershop. Precision cuts, clean fades, and the hot-towel shave — done unhurried.

The menu, made simple.

No upsells, no confusion. Every cut finishes with a hot towel and a straight-razor neck line.

Walk-ins welcome. Booking preferred, especially weekends.

The Craft

A haircut is 20 minutes. A good one lasts a month.

We keep the room quiet, the towels hot, and the blades sharp. No conveyor belt, no rushing you out of the chair — just barbers who take the extra pass to get the line right.

Same chair, same barber, every time. That's how a fade holds its line.

12yr
On the block
4
